mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default AS isDefault, create_time AS createTime FROM t_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_address (user_id, name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
